'''Reltooine''' was a [[Planet/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Tingel Arm/Legends|Tingel Arm]]. It was a part of the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> and a member world of the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]].

Reltooine's many [[Moon/Legends|moons]] were popular tourist destinations, replete with breathtaking sights such as rings, erupting [[Volcano/Legends|cryovolcanoes]], and fiery [[Aurora/Legends|aurorae]].<ref name="TEA" /> The luxury liner ''[[Lady of Mindor]]'' stopped here during its voyage between [[Roonadan]] and [[Ammuud/Legends|Ammuud]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

{{Planet-stub}}
